rule_text: The design note states at least one tradeoff that was rejected and why.

target.value: We chose longest-match dispatch over a priority field on each pattern. A priority field would let authors pin matches explicitly, but it pushes ordering knowledge out of the regex set into a separate ranking — and we already saw in #211 that humans miss this kind of cross-cutting state. Longest-match keeps the precedence rule local to the pattern itself.

notes: Names the rejected alternative (priority field) and gives a concrete reason it was rejected.
